'''nganushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qlty|qlty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qlty|qlty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nganushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngænishith|ngænishith]] || [[word:ngænishij|ngænishij]] || [[word:ngænishish|ngænishish]] || [[word:ngænishi|ngænishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganunushuth|nganunushuth]] || [[word:nganunushuj|nganunushuj]] || [[word:nganunushush|nganunushush]] || [[word:nganunushu|nganunushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganushuth|nganushuth]] || [[word:nganushuj|nganushuj]] || [[word:nganushush|nganushush]] || [[word:nganushu|nganushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganufshuth|nganufshuth]] || [[word:nganufshuj|nganufshuj]] || [[word:nganufshush|nganufshush]] || [[word:nganufshuf|nganufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nganushuthu|nganushuthu]] || [[word:nganushuju|nganushuju]] || [[word:nganushushu|nganushushu]] || [[word:nganushuku|nganushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nganushuth|nganushuth]] || [[word:nganushuj|nganushuj]] || [[word:nganushush|nganushush]] || [[word:nganushu|nganushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nganushuthul|nganushuthul]] || [[word:nganushujul|nganushujul]] || [[word:nganushushul|nganushushul]] || [[word:nganushukul|nganushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nganushuthuthu|nganushuthuthu]] || [[word:nganushujuju|nganushujuju]] || [[word:nganushushushu|nganushushushu]] || [[word:nganushuku|nganushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nganushuthun|nganushuthun]] || [[word:nganushujun|nganushujun]] || [[word:nganushushun|nganushushun]] || [[word:nganushukun|nganushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nganushuthuoro|nganushuthuoro]] || [[word:nganushujuoro|nganushujuoro]] || [[word:nganushushuoro|nganushushuoro]] || [[word:nganushukuoro|nganushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
